---
title: "The Rev. Edward Lyon Berthon"
---

## The Rev. Edward Lyon Berthon

**Dates:** (1813-1899)

### Description

Vicar of Romsey and inventor of the screw propeller

### Biography

He married in June 1834 and his wife died in 1865;  he was a friend of the Rev. C. A. Johns;  neither his ODNB entry nor his <i>Retrospect</i> shed any light on the scandal described by CMY.

### Letters

- Letter from June 1st 1876

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
